source_boundary: This audit reads extracted candidates only. It does not read reviewed records and does not publish website content.

tier_definitions.basic: A hazard is mentioned, with limited candidate detail.
tier_definitions.full: Candidate coverage includes profile/risk material, mitigation, visuals, tables, and data-source leads.
tier_definitions.none: No useful candidate plan data was found.
tier_definitions.standard: A hazard has a likely section or several evidence candidates.
tier_definitions.strong: A hazard has section evidence, mitigation/action material, and a table or visual.
